---
title: "Makayla Visin"
name: "Makayla Visin"
image: "/images/profile_pics/makayla_visin.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** UW Bird-Window Collision Project"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2022-2023"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "5"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
